item.title: The 413th vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps
item.description:
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild *every other* Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever one of my dumps goes Viral.
Hot
Cheese
That's not really permanently, then.
OC at the bottom
This is my newly commissioned Signature Image, by Dark Arts Studios. He's no longer on The Imgurs, I met him on ElbowDeepInAHorse's Discord Server. Here's where you can see his work: https://twitter.com/Anubis23342060 https://www.furaffinity.net/user/thed4rk1ord/ https://tailsofthegods.com/ https://dark-arts.itch.io/ FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten @CodyBurkett @OhValleyOfPlenty @AbbiiStabbii @DigiT00l @MemeMuseumCurator @CeleryMan7 @DumpsterKoala @JebidiahBeetus @Kaeldra @KirbyVictorious @HermioneDanger00 @DumpReview @WhiskeyJelly @JasonPositivityPilot @danat101 @PotatoCheesMonk @VanessaNelson @NotMuchBiggerThanAWomprat @MindNumbingBraIncAndy @TheMellowMoron @TheWoodsAreVile @ThatOtherGirlYouKnow @IStealMemesAndStuff @DrWalters @DaymanAhAAAAah Lemme know If you are a Regular Dumper and would like to be added to the list! Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #MemeDump #Phone_Dump #Dump #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple

item.title: Fresh dump from the bakery - Wednesday meme dump
item.description:
1. Funny, but I hope they didn't hurt eachother
2. Even if it's not a good job, you can still find ways to enjoy it
3. I seem to remember that they specifically told the actress she won't be involved in some stupid love plot or something and they re-wrote the script to be exactly this....
4. Useful boy
5. Funny dump, am I right haha
6. To all the non-Belles of the world, hang in there : )
7. I feel the Leslie Knope's of the governments deserve more appreciation. Without them I feel most countries will fall apart, while some idiot politician gets all the credit
8
9. Ewwww, human
10. The ending we deserved
11. We truly did
12
13. I like how he made this amazing thing, but with seat he was like "fuck it, I'l just grab the nearest chair"
14. What would be the spell to get jacked in the HP universe?
I wanted to share with you that as well as browsing and posting on Imgur all day I'm also making a passion project of mine. If you liked the humor in this dump I think you will like the game too called "Do Not Press The Button (To Delete The Multiverse). It is inspired by "The Stanley Parable" and similar in tone and features funny signs like this one here. Can you imagine? A first person game mixed with humor? https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ Anyway, It would mean the world to me and my brother if you checked the game out on Steam and gave it a wishlist. It won't disappoint. I promise. Just do not press the big red button, tho.
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: I started hormones x.x
item.description: 2014 - 2024 started last summer.. stuff is hard and it feels like I started too late sometimes but im a lot happier than I was the last 6-7 years and ive met a bunch of great people since I moved to the west coast that have been really supportive ^.^
item.dc:creator: Mooman219

Fun stuff.
item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: He was only 33
item.description: He wasn't feeling well, fainted, and never woke up. It was exactly 17 months after my father died unexpectedly from a cardiac event. Almost a year after my aunt died. 6 months after I had to put down my cat. Is it possible to overload your brain on grief? WHY CAN'T I CRY FOR HIM?! Edit: This post was just meant to be my feeble yelp into the abyss. "Thankful" doesn't even begin to describe how I feel about this community. I'm almost overwhelmed at how kind, compassionate, honest, and uplifting Imgurians have been. And I'm thankful that so many people were willing to share their own grief. It's oddly comforting to know you're not alone when it feels like the world is crumbling around you. Somehow, you've managed to make another terrible day so much better. I really appreciate all the resources, articles, videos, and songs people shared. I've been diving in and trying to soak up all the information I can, and I've started a little playlist to try to help me through the coming months. I can't respond to all the comments, but I've read and upvoted all of them. Truly, I appreciate you all.
item.dc:creator: NeedingVsGetting

item.title: I'm on a boat! (part 6, 1-year anniversary!)
item.description:
A year ago I bought this ship, a classic Dutch 'tjalk'. Originally built in 1896. She is in rough shape now, but the goal is to restore and transform her into a live - aboard sailboat. Enjoy! Link the previous post: https://imgur.com/gallery/pOLg296
1 year of progress
I added a bunch more plywood to the interior walls, side, and ceiling.
Finished the ceiling
Painted the ceiling and placed the pipe for the woodstove.
I ran some wires for the bedroom, insulated and sheeted the walls
Bedroom floor and fitting the bed frames
I placed the living room/kitchen floor (22mm pinewood)
All done, it started to feel a lot homier
Placing the wood stove was a bit of a chore, it was so heavy it took 4 people to move it.
Burns beautifully! For the observing Dutch viewer, yes, this pic was taken December 5th.
So far the main focus was making the inside pretty and liveable, until I fell through one of the temporary wooden sheets that covered the engine area. So I had some new lids made.
I made the countertop for the kitchen.
I strategically placed the water pump in the (would be) the least accessible kitchen cabinet.
After finishing the kitchen area I shifted my attention to the bathroom and made some lights and mirrors where the basin is going to go.
I covered the shower walls with this funky metallic blue Bidond, and after that I dry fitted the bathtub
Secured the bath, and tiled the rest of the area
Same floor as the living room
Tiles all done.
done
I made a little bar area, the planks are made from old railroad ties.
Really pleased with how it turned out.
I added a bunch more insulation to the big area's between the windows. This helps to reduce the condensation. The steel around the window will be covered with cork at some point.
A bit more finishing work
With the bathroom, kitchen, electrical work, heating, water, etc. all functional it was good enough to move in. The area is nice and quiet, and this greatly decreased the cost of living. Best move ever! Thanks for viewing! Yet to come; - A nice settee - Basin is the bathroom - The rest of the boat!
item.dc:creator: tomfromtomtomland

item.title: Some little oil paintings I’ve been working on the last few weeks- enjoy!
item.dc:creator: AmelieWithSpoon

item.title: Thank you human for rescuing me.
item.description: His family just said "A year ago he showed up on a super chilly day. His name is "bunbun" ! When we rescued him, we thought he was pregnant because his belly was so big.. But when we took him to the vet, it turned out he had 1L of urine in his bladde.. Poor thing couldn't urinate and was in pain. He had toughed it out for about five days like that, battling the freezing cold. But despite all that, he was healthy and didn't even have any kidney issues, so the vet said "You're a miracle!" He went through 3 major surgeries.. He got himself an artificial urethra! Even now, he needs a catheter to urinate but.. He's living his best life!" Source : https://www.instagram.com/reel/C3hMaKeJfW8/ https://www.instagram.com/boku_debu
item.dc:creator: Rammsteinstochter

item.title: Screaming into the void
item.description: I'm really not doing great. It's hard enough reaching out for help. Your cries going unanswered for so long makes it even harder. Feels like I'm barely holding on more then half the time and I really don't know how much longer I can do this. Hoping this dies in usersub. I just needed to complain
item.dc:creator: SirSnickleFritz
